channel.title: ATTACH on De Satirica
channel.description: Recent content in ATTACH on De Satirica

item.title: A Love Letter to Emacs
item.description: Emacs is awesome. Chances are, if you’re reading this, you’re probably familiar with academic research or software development. My objective with this post is to tell you how much of an impact Emacs had in those two areas of my life. My hope is that, by explaining to the things I like most about it, you might be interested in trying it yourself, although I’m not harbouring much hope on this front.
